---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or change to existing behavior
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one or two sentence description of what you are proposing.

## Problem or motivation

What situation is this solving? Why does the current behavior fall short?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature in as much detail as you have. Screenshots, mockups, or shell commands are all welcome.

## PRINCIPLES alignment

Electronic Clam has a [product constitution](../../docs/PRINCIPLES.md). Please indicate which principle your proposal aligns with, or note if it requires an exception.

> *This proposal aligns with Principle N (…) because …*

If the proposal touches something listed as an **anti-goal** in `docs/PRINCIPLES.md`, explain why you believe an exception is warranted and which ADR would need to change.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about, and why did you prefer this one?

## Additional context

Any links, prior art, or related issues.
